CERN Open Hardware Licence v2 — Permissive (CERN-OHL-P)
================================================================

This notice applies to hardware description files in this directory.

Product:     cfar_ca.v
Upstream:    AERIS-10 PLFM Radar — https://github.com/NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR
Licensor:    AERIS-10 open-hardware contributors (see upstream repository)
License:     CERN-OHL-P v2 — https://ohwr.org/cern_ohl_p_v2.txt

You may use, copy, modify, and distribute cfar_ca.v under the terms of
CERN-OHL-P. This bundled copy is provided so the MIT-licensed testbench in
hdl/radar_demo_tb.v can simulate standalone.

Obligations when redistributing (summary — read full licence text):
  • Keep this notice and the full CERN-OHL-P licence text with the file.
  • Document modifications if you change cfar_ca.v.
  • Do not imply endorsement by CERN or the upstream authors.

Full legal text: https://ohwr.org/cern_ohl_p_v2.txt
Repository legal index: ../docs/LEGAL.md and ../NOTICE.md
